headline: $67.2 Bn Industrial Water Reuse Systems Market - Global Forecast to 2036 Featuring Veolia, Xylem, Suez, Evoqua Water Technologies, Pentair, Aqua Metals, Thermax, Doosan Hydro, Alfa Laval, and Pall
summary: The global industrial water reuse systems market is projected to soar from USD 23.9 billion in 2026 to USD 67.2 billion by 2036, growing at a CAGR of 10.9%. Driven by rapid industrialization, sustainability goals, and net-zero targets, this market is segmented by technology, application, and end-use industry. Membrane filtration leads in technology, while cooling water reuse dominates applications. The power generation industry is the major end-user. Geographically, Asia-Pacific holds the larges
